

AWS App Runner will no longer be open to new customers starting April 30, 2026. If you would like to use App Runner, sign up prior to that date. Existing customers can continue to use the service as normal. For more information, see [AWS App Runner availability change](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apprunner/latest/dg/apprunner-availability-change.html).

# About AWS App Runner release notes
<a name="welcome"></a>

The AWS App Runner release notes provide detailed information about App Runner releases—new features, updates, and fixes related to the service, runtimes, and console. All new releases and updates are detailed in this guide.

For the list of release notes, see [App Runner release notes](relnotes.md).

## Additional resources
<a name="welcome.resources"></a>

The following related resources can help you as you work with this service.
+ **[AWS App Runner Developer Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apprunner/latest/dg/)** – Concepts, tutorials, and reference materials.
